characters.name: Ai Haibara
characters.description: It's gone! The body is gone!This article is a stub and needs improving. You can help Detective Conan Wikibyexpanding itor perhaps you could contribute to thediscussionof the topic. Ai HaibaraAnimeMangaLive-actionBiographical InformationEnglishNameAnita Hailey(Alias; VIZ)Vi Graythorn(Alias; FUNimation)Sherry(Codename)JapaneseName灰原 哀(Alias)宮野 志保(Real Name)シェリー(Codename)RomanizedNameHaibara Ai(Alias)Miyano Shiho(Real Name)Sherī(Codename)OtherNamesPrincessThe Evil-Eyed Yawny GirlPersonal InformationAge6-7(Ai Haibara)18(Shiho Miyano)Birth DateUnknownGenderFemaleHeightUnknownWeightUnknownBlood TypeUnknownOccupationTeitan Elementary SchoolStudentDetective BoysMemberNationalityBritish - JapaneseRelativesAtsushi Miyano(Father) †Elena Miyano(Mother) †Akemi Miyano(Elder sister) †Unnamed (Grandfather)Unnamed (Grandmother)Hiroshi Agasa(Guardian)DebutMangaDebutChapter 16(Silhouette)Chapter 176(Full Appearance)AnimeDebutEpisode 129KeyholeNumberVolume 18AppearancesChapters356Episodes293Movies21OVAs12Specials3Openings40Closings7Voice ActorsJapanese VAMegumi HayashibaraEnglish VABrina Palencia(Funimation)Erica Mendez(Bang Zoom!)Xanthe Huynh(Marcias Group)Alexis Tipton(Studio Nano)Drama ActorKyoka Shibata(Ai Haibara)Yu Kashii(Shiho Miyano) Ai Haibara is highly intelligent and has a calm, cool, and sarcastic attitude. After defecting from the Black Organization, Ai was skeptical and pushed others away due to her belief that the people she had involved in her life after shrinking into a child may be put into harm should the Black Organization discover her true identity. As the series progresses, Ai has warmed herself up by embracing her new life and established strong bonds with Conan Edogawa,Ran Mouri,Professor Agasa, and theDetective Boys. Ai Haibara currently idolizes the Big Osaka Soccer Player - Ryusuke Higo since both of them have similar situations with her being betrayed by the Black Organization and Ryusuke by Noir Tokyo. She also likes to hearYoko Okino's songs due to the fact that Ryusuke also likes her songs but eventually deleted all of them after hearing a rumored date between the two of them. Soon, she renews her interest in both of them and goes to play soccer with the Detective Boys while singing Yoko's song "Dandy Lion". In Non-Canon, she was shown admiring Sannomiya Kazunori, an actor playing a detective role. Although she may be normally cool and cold person, there are times when her composed demeanour is disrupted. This was shown when she lost her Higo Strap that Higo himself touch. At that moment, she was so devastated that she collapsed against the wall, being completely left in a daze. Ai Haibara appears to have some interest in fashion as she made repeated requests for certain types of accessories, particularly of the "Fusae" and "Prada" Brands. She also frequently shown reading the "ComCom Magazine", similar to Japan's "CanCam" Fashion Magazine, and has knowledge over various types of makeup accessories.

characters.name: Akemi Miyano
characters.description: It's gone! The body is gone!This article is a stub and needs improving. You can help Detective Conan Wikibyexpanding itor perhaps you could contribute to thediscussionof the topic. Akemi MiyanoBiographical InformationEnglishNameKendra Miyano(Real Name)Michelle Hamlin(Alias)JapaneseName宮野 明美(Real Name)広田 雅美(Alias)RomanizedNameAkemi Miyano(Real Name)Masami Hirota(Alias)OtherNamesUnknownPersonal InformationAge25Birth DateUnknownGenderFemaleHeightUnknownWeightUnknownBlood TypeUnknownOccupationKarasuma Group MemberBank Employee(As Masami)NationalityBritish - JapaneseRelativesAtsushi Miyano(Father)†Elena Miyano(Mother)†Shiho Miyano(Younger sister)Unnamed(Grandfather)Unnamed(Grandmother)DebutMangaDebutChapter 13AnimeDebutEpisode 13KeyholeNumberVolume 41AppearancesChapters22Episodes18Movies1OVAs0Specials0Openings4Closings0Voice ActorsJapanese VASakiko TamagawaMasako Katsuki(Former)English VAAlex ValleClarine Harp(Former)Drama ActorUnknown Akemi had a nurturing, kind, friendly, cheerful and outgoing personality, with a good sense of humor. Playful as a child, she enjoyed playing games and creating codes for other people, but never to hurt them. For example, she hid the work tools of her father's friends and happily watched as they panicked; however, she only wanted them to work less hard. Even though she knew of her elementary classmates’ mischievings, in the class memory capsule, she did not rat them out but simply wished everyone well. She was popular among classmates for her sweet nature. She appeared likable and well-adjusted considering that she had to change schools many times. As an adult, she remained loving despite being in the Black Organization. She likely had to violate her moral code to complete criminal missions for them. However, she was strong-willed enough to arrange an escape deal for her and her sister. Although they rarely saw each other, she and her sister Shiho were very close and confided in each other. However, Shuichi says Akemi was always crying in the dark while pretending to be strong, suggesting that she had painful memories she did not want to burden other people with. Her selfless, nurturing, and slightly vulnerable personality reminds Shiho (as Haibara Ai) as well as Akai Shuichi of Ran Mouri. Akemi was clever and calculating, given that she could plan a 1-billion-yen robbery. Her convincing disguise and acting eluded even Conan.

characters.name: Amanda Hughes
characters.description: Amanda HughesBiographical InformationEnglishNameAmanda HughesJapaneseNameアマンダ・ヒューズRomanizedNameAmanda HyūzuPersonal InformationAge† 81 (17 years ago)Gender♀ FemaleOccupationPoliticianNationalityAmericanRelativesRachel Asaka(adoptive daughter)DebutMangaDebutChapter 948AnimeDebutEpisode 861KeyholeNumberVolume 104AppearancesChapters8Episodes6Openings1Voice ActorsJapanese VAMiina Tominaga Amanda Hughes(アマンダ・ヒューズ,Amanda Hyūzu?)is a character in the manga and anime franchiseDetective Conan. Amanda Hughes was an American VIP in contact with theFBIandCIA. She was so powerful in the United States that theBlack Organization, with the intention of a forcing help, tried to threaten her seventeen years ago. She was a contender to be the next president of the US. She had a closest bodyguard,Rachel Asaka, who was as important as a daughter for her. She was also a big fan ofKohji Haneda, who visited and played chess with him that fateful night, and a friend ofTsutomu Akai. She had been targetingRenya Karasumaand his criminal organization for a long time. About sixty-seven years ago, when he was only a child, she metRumas one of important guests at Karasuma's birthday party. Fifty years later, they met again at a hotel in the United States and she remembered him. Instead of become part of their family, she sacrificed herself to save her adoptive daughter and intentionally swallowed his drug developed by the organization, which led to her death. She left a dying message, using her wristwatch and a knight piece, to warn about his snake-like eye's special ability. She was an intelligent, confident, and quick-witted woman. During the confrontation with Rum and his subordinates, she appeared self-confident. She learned Japanese.
characters.personality_section: She was an intelligent, confident, and quick-witted woman. During the confrontation with Rum and his subordinates, she appeared self-confident. She learned Japanese.

characters.description: It's gone! The body is gone!This article is a stub and needs improving. You can help Detective Conan Wikibyexpanding itor perhaps you could contribute to thediscussionof the topic. Andre CamelBiographical InformationEnglishNameAndre CamelJapaneseNameアンドレ・キャメルRomanizedNameAndore KyameruOtherNamesMean Looking ForeignerPersonal InformationAge27Birth DateUnknownGender♂ MaleHeightUnknownWeightUnknownBlood TypeUnknownOccupationFBI AgentNationalityAmerican - GermanRelativesUnknownDebutMangaDebutChapter 599AnimeDebutEpisode 497KeyholeNumberVolume 58AppearancesChapters32Episodes23Movies2OVAs0Specials0Openings7Closings0Voice ActorsJapanese VAKiyoyuki YanadaKenji NomuraEnglish VAUnknownDrama ActorUnknown Despite his rather hulking appearance, Camel is a friendly person who cares about the feelings of his fellow FBI agents. He can react quickly, as shown by his driving skills and his role in returning Kir to the black Organization. However, he does not always make the best choices as shown when his concern for an old man wound up ruining Shuichi Akai's cover in the Black Organization.

Aoko NakamoriAnimeMangaBiographical InformationEnglishNameAoko Fuller(Unconfirmed)JapaneseName中森 青子RomanizedNameAoko NakamoriOtherNamesUnknownPersonal InformationAge16 (at start of series)17 (as of Blue Birthday)Birth DateSeptember 12GenderFemaleHeight(approximately 5 feet 3 inches)WeightUnknownBlood TypeUnknownOccupationEkoda High School StudentNationalityJapaneseRelativesGinzo Nakamori(Father)Midoriko Nakamori(Mother)DebutMangaDebutChapter 159AnimeDebutEpisode 76KeyholeNumberUnknownAppearancesChapters1Episodes2Movies1OVAs1Specials12Openings4Closings2Voice ActorsJapanese VAMao Ichimichi(MK 1412 and The Million-Dollar Pentagram)Ayumi Fujimura(MK Specials)Minami Takayama(Former)Yukiko Iwai(Former)English VAUnknown (Funimation)Jill Harris(Studio Nano)Drama ActorUnknown Aoko Nakamori has a fiery, temperamental, yet also sweet and gentle personality, prone to impulsive behavior and shouting, especially in response to Kaito Kuroba's actions. She is intelligent and capable but can also display a mischievous side and childish tendencies, like referring to herself in the third person. She fiercely opposes Kaitou Kid and is protective of her father, while harboring a deep, unconfessed affection for her childhood friend Kaito.

characters.personality_section: Aoko Nakamori has a fiery, temperamental, yet also sweet and gentle personality, prone to impulsive behavior and shouting, especially in response to Kaito Kuroba's actions. She is intelligent and capable but can also display a mischievous side and childish tendencies, like referring to herself in the third person. She fiercely opposes Kaitou Kid and is protective of her father, while harboring a deep, unconfessed affection for her childhood friend Kaito.

Ayami OginoBiographical InformationJapaneseName荻野 彩実RomanizedNameOgino AyamiPersonal InformationAgeAround 30Gender♀ FemaleOccupationInspector from Saitama police districtNationalityJapaneseDebutAnimeDebutMovie 13AppearancesMovies1Voice ActorsJapanese VAHiromi Tsuru She is a very calm and quiet policewoman. She has heard much aboutKogoro, but he just shocked her with his stupid conclusions fully shared by Sango instead, and she is more amazed byConan's achievements. She is also a fan ofShinichiand relies more on him than Kogoro, but she hadn't heard anything about him until recently.

CalvadosBiographical InformationEnglishNameCalvados(Codename)JapaneseNameカルバドス(Codename)RomanizedNameKarubadosu(Codename)OtherNamesSniperPersonal InformationAge† UnknownBirth DateUnknownGender♂ MaleHeightUnknownWeightUnknownBlood TypeUnknownOccupationBlack OrganizationMemberNationalityJapaneseRelativesUnknownDebutMangaDebutChapter 433AnimeDebutEpisode 345KeyholeNumberUnknownAppearancesChapters3Episodes2Movies0OVAs0Specials0Openings0Closings0Voice ActorsJapanese VAUnknownEnglish VAUnknownDrama ActorUnknown Calvados appears to be a ruthless assassin has he did not stop shootingRan MouriwhenVermouthordered him to hold his fire. In addition, Calvados is shown to be courageous and loyal to the Black Organization as he showed determination to commit suicide, despite being crippled byShuichi Akaiand left by Vermouth, in order to prevent the Law Enforcement from questioning him about the Black Organization's identity.
